text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Fuji Kiseki has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Do you remember that promise we made before?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We made a promise to go on a hot spring
vacation once we had the time, remember?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She whips out a familiar-looking hot spring
vacation coupon out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now that things have calmed down, why don't we
go? I promise it'll be a vacation unlike any you've
ever had.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide a date for our trip right away, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of our hot spring vacation is here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I run to our meeting spot, hoping I'm not too late.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good morning, Trainer! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You're fine. I've already contacted the
inn, so we can take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
By the way, have you eaten breakfast yet? I
ordered some takeout just in case.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: We can eat it together on the train, if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki acts as my guide, and we make it to
the inn safely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey! How was your bath? Nice and relaxing, I
hope?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's great. The water was so nice, it warmed me
right to my core.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
While we're at it, here. Have some delicious
spring water. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki continues to be the perfect guide and
host as we make our way through the inn.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's a beautiful field of flowers over there and
still time before dinner, so why don't we go and
take a look?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You look like you really like the food.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You can have my share too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, she has me by the hand, leading
me down a rural path through the rice fields.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It's getting dark, so watch your step!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've just been going with the flow and
letting her take care of me the entire time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This trip is meant to be relaxing for both of us—I
can't let her exhaust herself like this!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Are you tired?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I shouldn't have dragged you out on a walk
without warning. Let's head back.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What is it, then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how I want her to let her own hair down
and relax instead of worrying over me constantly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that all? Thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I'm doing this because I love making
you smile more than anything.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Getting to see you smile all day long has been so
nourishing for my both my heart and body.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But... Well... If you'd really like me to relax more,
then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She snaps her fingers smartly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Peeeew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A huge firework shoots into the air and explodes
above us!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'd like you to enjoy this trip with every fiber of
your being.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Surprised? I didn't set this up, to be
honest. There just happens to be a fireworks show
today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is supposed to be a good secret spot to view
it from.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fireworks launch one after the next and bloom
bright and sparkling in the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering how perfect our timing was, she must
have invited me on this walk just for the fireworks
show.
choice_data_list: (Just how much research did she do for today?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I think back on our day together, I realize
Fuji Kiseki must've readied everything in advance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you're having fun! There are some
benches we can sit on over ther—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's wrong? You're staring at me so
intensely.
choice_data_list:
Thank you for making today such a memorable
day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: I'm grateful for all the thought you put into this.
I'm grateful for all the thought you put into this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's obvious how much heart and effort she put
into today's preparations, from breakfast to the
flower field to the fireworks show.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A lovely red tinges Fuji Kiseki's cheeks as I speak.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
O-oh. Well... I'm happy to hear that. The thing
is...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to make today special. I hope I
didn't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to thank you too for gracing me with your
wonderful smile.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Here's to many more days of smiling together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Fuji Kiseki and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
